use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms such as submit, save, or confirm operations
Navigation actions like opening modals, dialogs, or triggering state changes
Call-to-action buttons in marketing pages, landing pages, or dashboards
Secondary action options alongside primary buttons in multi-action interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile Button component built with Radix UI Slot and CVA for composition and variant management. Features multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, with proper focus states, hover effects, and disabled handling. Clean, minimal styling with subtle shadows and rounded corners suitable for professional UI systems.
